estate: Regional utility SCADA estate spanning substations, renewables telemetry, feeder automation, and outage response systems.

scenarios.nextAction: Move substation controls into a protected remediation window and require operator-ready rollback proof before firmware change.
Rebaseline inverter telemetry and verify drift alarms before scaling the next remote diagnostics release.
Keep feeder automation in monitor mode while SQL incident views are reconciled with outage tickets.
